youtube_metadata.title: 10 Tiny Apps Making $30K to $1M a Month (Built With AI)
youtube_metadata.summary: 10 Tiny Apps Making $30K to $1M a Month (Built With AI)
youtube_metadata.description:
Tiny apps — most built by one person, many built mostly by AI — are quietly making $30,000 to over $1,000,000 a month. I dug through Stripe screenshots, press reports and founder interviews to separate the real ones from the hype, and for every app you get the simple mechanic AND the exact way you could build your own version this weekend.

⏱️ Tip: watch at 1.25x–1.5x if you like a faster pace (Settings → Playback speed).

📥 FREE — The Tiny App Blueprint (all 10 apps, the build stack, the 4 money patterns + copy-paste prompts):
Comment TINY and I'll send it to you, or grab it here → https://hyperautomationlabs.co/free/tiny

Every revenue number is tagged on screen as VERIFIED (real press) or SELF-REPORTED (founder's own post). Numbers are point-in-time.

THE 10 TINY APPS:
1. fly.pieter.com — Pieter Levels — browser flight sim, ~$50K/mo from in-game ads — built 100% in Cursor in ~3 hrs (404 Media)
2. Launch Fast — Hasaam Bhatti — Amazon-seller tool, $30K/mo — built in Cursor by a non-co

youtube_metadata.title: How a New LLC Got a $20,000 Line of Credit in Minutes
youtube_metadata.summary: How a New LLC Got a $20,000 Line of Credit in Minutes
youtube_metadata.description:
Get CDFI Funding Sequence - https://www.creditplug.com/cdfi-advisory.html
How a New LLC Got a $20,000 BlueVine Line of Credit in Minutes (Cashflow-Based Funding) - https://www.bluevine.com/partner/credit-plug

The video shows a client approval for a $20,000 BlueVine cashflow-based line of credit, explaining that qualification is driven mainly by business checking activity (with a soft pull for identity) and can work with a relatively new LLC after a few months of transactions. It reviews the terms (26-week draw term and a 0.97% weekly rate based on weekly balance), demonstrates how draws are entered, and notes additional BlueVine services. The speaker explains the client was set up with QuickBooks first so BlueVine could pull and underwrite business data through QuickBooks, resulting in approval in about five minutes. The key strategy shared is building consistent deposit activity over roughly three months, with more frequent deposits improving approval odds, emphasizing that banking h

youtube_metadata.title: 3k/Mo Entrepreneur Vs. 30k/Mo Entrepreneur
youtube_metadata.summary: 3k/Mo Entrepreneur Vs. 30k/Mo Entrepreneur
youtube_metadata.description:
The difference between the entrepreneur making $3K/month and the one making $30K/month usually is not time.

They both have the same 24 hours.

The difference is decisions.

The $3K/month entrepreneur is busy all day.

The $30K/month entrepreneur knows exactly which activities make money.

They know their numbers.

Close rate.

Cost per lead.

Average deal size.

Follow-up.

Lead flow.

Sales conversations.

Most people are not broke because they are lazy.

They are stuck because they are working on the wrong things and calling it productivity.

Being busy does not mean you are building.

Posting randomly is not marketing.

Talking about business is not sales.

Learning all day is not execution.

At some point, you have to identify the few things that actually move the business forward and put more pressure there.

That is how you scale.

Same 24 hours.

Different focus.

Different decisions.

Different income.

youtube_metadata.title: There’s A Version Of You That’s Already Winning
youtube_metadata.summary: There’s A Version Of You That’s Already Winning
youtube_metadata.description:
There’s a version of you who already did the work you’re avoiding.

They went to the gym.
They executed the play.
They launched the offer.
They took the course.
They paid the mentor.
They stopped hesitating and just moved.

That version of you is not more talented.
They’re just more obedient to their future.

You’re not racing the algorithm.
You’re not racing your friends.

You’re racing the 1% version of you who shows up every day whether they “feel like it” or not.

If you let that version beat you today, you don’t “stay the same” you quietly fall behind.

If you decide to compete with them today, you never really lose. You either win, or you stack proof that you’re becoming that person.
